lesson.menu_desc: How much / how many + quantities -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- At the Supermarket -- How much and how many
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 9 -- At the Supermarket

listenings.text: Hi, I am Tom. I go to the supermarket every Saturday. I always buy a lot of food. I buy six apples and ten eggs. I buy some milk and some cheese. I have a big bag for my food. The apples are cheap, but the cheese is expensive. I do not have a lot of money, so I buy only what I need.

Hello, my name is Anna. Today I make a shopping list for my family. I need some milk for breakfast. I need eight eggs and four apples. How much is the cheese? It is expensive. I do not buy a lot. I have my bag and my money. At the supermarket, I always check the prices.

extra_audio.text: Let me tell you about Sandra at the supermarket. First, she makes a shopping list. Then, she takes her bag and her money. After that, she buys some milk and ten eggs. Finally, she pays for the food.
